summary: A Ukrainian esports player known as "Tucha" transitioned to become an FPV drone operator with the "Burevestnik" unmanned systems regiment after nine years of gaming experience. In the Kharkiv region, a Polish AHS Krab 155mm self-propelled howitzer was destroyed using an optical fiber FPV drone called "Provod." Ukrainian forces repelled Russian mechanized assaults in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions with support from Lasar's Group of the National Guard and the "Azov" unit. Meanwhile, the "Rubikon" Center reported 88 enemy targets destroyed in the Krasny Liman direction on March 7, 2026. Ukraine is preparing to send its first group of drone defense experts to the Middle East to assist Gulf countries in countering Iranian drones, as announced by President Zelensky.
